text: Trump: We will be talking about Iran later—we have very good conversations going on. It’s working out very well.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们稍后会谈论伊朗——我们正在进行非常好的对话。进展非常顺利。

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇸🇾 The Autonomous Administration of North and East Syria and the Syrian central government have signed a formal agreement in Damascus. Key provisions include: 40% of local resources are allocated to the Autonomous Administration; the Syrian Democratic Forces (SDF) remain in their current structure under the Defence Ministry while preserving their operational characteristics; employees of Autonomous Administration institutions will be integrated into the state under a decentralisation framework; salaries are standardised across government institutions; and Kurdish representation is guaranteed in all ministries and government bodies. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇸🇾 北和东叙利亚自治政府与叙利亚中央政府在大马士革签署了一项正式协议。主要条款包括：40%的当地资源分配给自治政府；叙利亚民主军（SDF）在国防部下保持其现有结构，同时保留其作战特性；自治政府机构的员工将在权力下放框架下被纳入国家体系；政府机构的工资实现标准化；并保证库尔德人在所有部委和政府机构中的代表权。@wfwitness

text: Iran's Supreme National Security Council on the Strait of Hormuz: Iran will maintain control and monitoring of the Strait until the war fully ends. Vessels must provide full information and receive clearance according to Iran’s regulations. Passage will be subject to security, safety, and environmental protection requirements and costs. Any disruption or blockade attempts will be treated as a violation of the ceasefire. Iran will prevent even limited reopening if the enemy continues hostile maritime actions.
text_zh: 伊朗最高国家安全委员会关于霍尔木兹海峡的声明：在战争完全结束前，伊朗将保持对海峡的控制和监控。船只必须提供完整信息并根据伊朗的规定获得许可。通行将受到安全、安保和环境保护要求及费用的限制。任何干扰或封锁企图都将被视为违反停火协议。如果敌人继续采取敌对的海上行动，伊朗将阻止即使是有限的重新开放。

text: NEW: Iran's Supreme National Security Council: After the enemies were defeated on the battlefield, they themselves began requesting a ceasefire and negotiations. The talks lasted 21 hours without interruption, with Iran pursuing the people’s demands despite deep mistrust of the United States. The enemy raised new excessive demands, but Iran made clear it would not retreat from its positions. New proposals have been presented, and Iran is still reviewing them without response. Not even a hair’s breadth of compromise, retreat, or leniency will be accepted.
text_zh: 最新消息：伊朗最高国家安全委员会：在敌人在战场上被击败后，他们自己开始请求停火和谈判。会谈持续了21个小时没有中断，尽管对美国深感不信任，伊朗仍追求人民的要求。敌人提出了新的过分要求，但伊朗明确表示不会从其立场上退缩。新的提议已经提出，伊朗仍在审查中，尚未做出回应。绝不接受哪怕一丁点的妥协、退让或宽容。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷 The secretariat of Iran’s Supreme National Security Council is expected to issue a statement shortly on the latest developments in negotiations to "end the third imposed war." @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 Iran’s Supreme National Security Council said U.S. negotiators accepted Tehran’s 10‑point plan as a framework but then made excessive demands, leading to the first round of talks ending without result. A second round is pending if the U.S. aligns its demands with battlefield realities. New U.S. proposals have been submitted via Pakistan’s army chief and are under review; no response has been given yet. Iran insists that a temporary ceasefire required a halt to fighting on all fronts, including Lebanon. After Israeli violations, Iran pressed for a Lebanon ceasefire, which Israel eventually accepted. Under the arrangement, the Strait of Hormuz would be conditionally opened for commercial vessels only (no military or hostile ships), with Iranian control, permits and designated routes, for the duration of the ceasefire. Any U.S. naval blockade or disruption will be considered a ceasefire violation and Iran will prevent even conditional passage @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷 预计伊朗最高国家安全委员会秘书处将很快就“结束第三次强加战争”谈判的最新进展发表声明。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 伊朗最高国家安全委员会表示，美国谈判代表接受了德黑兰的10点计划作为框架，但随后提出了过分要求，导致第一轮会谈无果而终。如果美国将其要求与战场现实相一致，则等待第二轮会谈。新的美国提议已通过巴基斯坦陆军参谋长提交，目前正在审查中；尚未做出回应。伊朗坚持认为，临时停火要求在所有战线（包括黎巴嫩）停止战斗。在以色列违反协议后，伊朗施压要求黎巴嫩停火，以色列最终接受了。根据该安排，在停火期间，霍尔木兹海峡将有条件地仅对商船（无军事或敌对船只）开放，并由伊朗控制、发放许可和指定航线。任何美国的封锁或干扰都将被视为违反停火协议，伊朗将阻止即使是有条件的通行。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 The secretariat of Iran’s Supreme National Security Council is expected to issue a statement shortly on the latest developments in negotiations to "end the third imposed war." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 伊朗最高国家安全委员会秘书处预计将很快就“结束第三次强加战争”谈判的最新进展发表声明。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 While the US podcast/comedian community has turned on Trump, Joe Rogan seems to have decided to stay loyal — you can see him standing right behind Trump. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 虽然美国播客/喜剧界已经背离了特朗普，但乔·罗根似乎决定保持忠诚——你可以看到他站在特朗普身后。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 "Trump talks too much" — Iranian Deputy Foreign Minister Saeed Khatibzadeh 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 “特朗普话太多了”——伊朗副外长赛义德·哈提卜扎德 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: U.S. Central Command Success begins and ends with our people. https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2045491539384701103/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部 成功始于我们的人民，也终于我们的人民。 https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2045491539384701103/video/1 推文

text: Faytuks News One UNIFIL officer killed, three wounded after being attacked by Hezbollah small arms fire in southern Lebanon This morning, a UNIFIL patrol clearing explosive ordnance along a road in the village of Ghanduriyah to re-establish links with isolated UNIFIL positions came under small-arms fire from non-state-actors. - UNIFIL tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 一名联合国驻黎巴嫩临时部队（联黎部队）军官在黎巴嫩南部遭真主党轻武器袭击身亡，另有三人受伤。今天上午，一支联黎部队巡逻队在甘杜里耶村沿路清理爆炸物以恢复与孤立的联黎部队阵地的联系时，遭到非国家行为者的轻武器射击。 - 联黎部队推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - South Africa's President calls for the IMF and World Bank to be "reformed" to not "continue to represent Western interests only... a global progressive revival is underway." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2045489181451804785/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 此刻 - 南非总统呼吁对国际货币基金组织和世界银行进行“改革”，使其不再“仅仅代表西方利益……一场全球性的进步复兴正在进行中。” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2045489181451804785/video/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 Donald Trump: 📌 “If we don’t reach a deal, we will obtain the nuclear ‘dust’ (highly enriched uranium) in another way — a much less friendly way.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2045488595436187691/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 唐纳德·特朗普：📌 “如果我们达不成协议，我们将以另一种方式获得核‘粉尘’（高浓缩铀）——一种非常不友好的方式。” 与我们一起查看最新动态： @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2045488595436187691/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated U.S. Army Secretary Dan Driscoll says Ukrainians have radically changed warfare and the U.S. is already applying their lessons. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045486949901689324/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 美国陆军部长丹·德里斯科尔表示，乌克兰人彻底改变了战争方式，美国已经在应用他们的经验教训。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045486949901689324/video/1 推文

text: At least 3 attacks on commercial ships were reported in Strait of Hormuz, with one vessel hit but no injuries. One ship was cleared to enter the Strait, then fired upon, forcing it to turn back. Two targeted ships were Indian tankers, including one carrying 2 million barrels of Iraqi oil. Source: Axios
text_zh: 据报道，霍尔木兹海峡发生了至少3起针对商船的袭击事件，其中一艘船只被击中，但没有人员伤亡。一艘船只获准进入海峡后遭到射击，被迫折返。两艘被袭击的船只是印度油轮，其中一艘载有200万桶伊拉克石油。来源：Axios

text: Trump: A rich friend of mine happened to be on Ozempic—it was not working, by the way. The guy was extremely successful but highly neurotic, got a lot of problems. I will not mention his name; he is begging me not to mention his name because he has become quite famous.
text_zh: 特朗普：我的一位富有的朋友碰巧在使用Ozempic——顺便说一句，这没起作用。那家伙非常成功，但高度神经质，有很多问题。我不会提他的名字；他求我不要提他的名字，因为他已经变得相当出名了。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇴🇲 An incident has been reported in the Gulf of Oman, near the Strait of Hormuz. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇴🇲 UKMTO: A cruise ship reported sighting a splash in close proximity to the vessel, 3 nautical miles east of Oman @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇴🇲 阿曼湾霍尔木兹海峡附近发生一起事故。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇴🇲 英国海上贸易行动办公室（UKMTO）：一艘游轮报告称在阿曼以东3海里处发现船只附近有溅水现象 @wfwitness

text: An Indian Air Force Su-30MKI fighter jet made a hard landing at Pune Airport after a landing gear failure. Both pilots were safe.
text_zh: 印度空军一架苏-30MKI战斗机在起落架故障后于浦那机场硬着陆。两名飞行员均安全。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇬🇧🇮🇷 UKMTO: A container ship has been hit by an unknown projectile 25 nautical miles north‑east of Oman, causing damage to some containers. No fires or environmental impact have been reported. Authorities are investigating. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇴🇲 An incident has been reported in the Gulf of Oman, near the Strait of Hormuz. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇬🇧🇮🇷 英国海上贸易行动办公室（UKMTO）：一艘集装箱船在阿曼东北部25海里处被不明抛射物击中，导致部分集装箱受损。目前未报告火灾或环境影响。当局正在调查。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇴🇲 阿曼湾霍尔木兹海峡附近发生一起事故。@wfwitness

text: Lukashenko: No matter what negotiations the West conducts with me, I perfectly understand that I am not their "son of a bitch." They would gladly chew me up and spit me out.
text_zh: 卢卡申科：无论西方与我进行何种谈判，我都很清楚我不是他们的“狗娘养的”。他们会很乐意把我嚼碎了再吐出来。

text: An initial review of the video documenting the school’s destruction shows no military activity in its vicinity. The nature of the explosion further indicates a controlled demolition using planted explosives, suggesting prior control of the site by Israeli forces and undermining any claim of military necessity. -These elements refute the claim that the school was being used for military purposes and reveal an attempt to justify the targeting of an educational civilian facility through misleading information. Given its nature and function, the destruction of a school raises serious concerns of violations of the principle of distinction between military objectives and civilian objects, particularly in the absence of any evidence of its use in hostilities, and in the absence of any demonstrated military necessity. The demolition of Marwahin Public Secondary School constitutes a grave violation of international humanitarian law - a war crime ✍ Additionally, no clashes took place in Marwahin overall. Nothing
text_zh: 对记录该学校被毁视频的初步审查显示，其附近没有任何军事活动。爆炸的性质进一步表明这是使用预埋炸药进行的控制爆破，这表明以色列军队此前已控制了该地点，并削弱了任何关于军事必要性的说法。-这些要素反驳了该学校被用于军事目的的说法，并揭示了通过误导性信息为针对教育性民用设施的行为辩护的企图。鉴于其性质和功能，学校的毁坏引发了对违反军事目标与民用物体区分原则的严重关切，特别是在没有任何证据表明其被用于敌对行动，且没有任何已证实的军事必要性的情况下。马尔瓦欣公立中学的拆毁构成了对国际人道主义法的严重违反——即战争罪 ✍ 此外，马尔瓦欣总体上没有发生任何冲突。什么都没有

text: However.... A Lebanese judicial source confirmed to The Legal Agenda that this image does not originate from a school, but from a courtroom in the Bint Jbeil courthouse. ... and that the weapons shown are judicially seized items held in official custody, a fact also confirmed by lawyers who regularly attend the court. The source further clarified that the weapons bear labels indicating the names of defendants and case numbers, which are visible in the image alongside the courtroom seating.
text_zh: 然而……一位黎巴嫩司法消息人士向《法律议程》证实，这张照片并非来自学校，而是来自宾特朱拜勒法院的法庭。……而且照片中显示的武器是司法扣押并由官方保管的物品，经常出入该法院的律师也证实了这一事实。该消息人士进一步澄清说，武器上贴有标明被告姓名和案件编号的标签，这些标签在照片中与法庭座位一起清晰可见。

text: Trump holds a press conference on Saturday at 9 a.m., with Joe Rogan standing behind him.
text_zh: 特朗普周六上午9点举行新闻发布会，乔·罗根站在他身后。

text: ❗️ Do you remember this photo? When the IDF lied again and claimed they found these in a school? On 16 April 2026, the Israeli army spokesperson published an image claiming it was from a “school in South Lebanon" showing a number of weapons, most of which appear to be hunting rifles. She claimed that more than 130 weapons belonging to Hezbollah were found inside the school, only hours after a video circulated documenting the Israeli army’s demolition of the Public Secondary School in Marwahin in South Lebanon.
text_zh: ❗️ 你还记得这张照片吗？当以色列国防军再次撒谎并声称他们在学校里发现了这些东西时？2026年4月16日，以色列军队发言人发布了一张照片，声称它来自“黎巴嫩南部的一所学校”，展示了一些武器，其中大部分看起来是猎枪。她声称在学校内发现了130多件属于真主党的武器，而就在几小时前，一段视频流传开来，记录了以色列军队拆毁黎巴嫩南部马尔瓦欣公立中学的情况。

text: By Yemeni cartoon Artist
text_zh: 由也门漫画艺术家创作

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇬🇧 Iran’s IRGC intelligence announced it has dismantled cells linked to the United States, Israel and the United Kingdom in the provinces of East Azerbaijan, Kerman and Mazandaran. The cells were allegedly involved in espionage, smuggling and orchestrating unrest. A total of 127 people have been arrested, and quantities of weapons and equipment have been seized. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇬🇧 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队情报部门宣布，已在东阿塞拜疆省、克尔曼省和马赞德兰省捣毁了与美国、以色列和英国有关联的组织。这些组织涉嫌参与间谍活动、走私和策划骚乱。共有127人被捕，并查获了大量武器和装备。@wfwitness

text: ELINT News RT @BarakRavid : A U.S. defense official claims the IRGC has conducted at least three attacks on commercial ships in the strait of Hormuz since Saturday morning tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转发 @BarakRavid：一名美国国防官员声称，自周六早上以来，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）已在霍尔木兹海峡对商船发动了至少三次袭击。推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇺🇸 According to Associated Press, The U.S. aircraft carrier USS Gerald R. Ford has entered the Red Sea, accompanied by two destroyers. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2045480889916826034/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：❗️ 🇺🇸 据美联社报道，美国“杰拉尔德·R·福特”号航空母舰已进入红海，并由两艘驱逐舰护航。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2045480889916826034/video/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran’s First Vice President Mohammad Reza Aref said management of the Strait of Hormuz is Iran’s legal right. “Either they will grant us our right at the negotiating table, or we will seize it on the battlefield,” he stated. He dismissed U.S. President Trump’s remarks as rhetoric, lies and delusions that do not merit a response. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗第一副总统穆罕默德·礼萨·阿雷夫表示，管理霍尔木兹海峡是伊朗的合法权利。“要么他们在谈判桌上给予我们权利，要么我们将在战场上夺取它，”他说道。他驳斥了美国总统特朗普的言论，称其为不值得回应的修辞、谎言和妄想。@wfwitness

text: María Corina Machado says she does not regret giving her Nobel to Trump: There is a leader in the world who has put the lives of his country’s citizens at risk for the freedom of Venezuela, and that is Trump.
text_zh: 玛丽亚·科里纳·马查多表示，她不后悔将自己的诺贝尔奖授予特朗普：世界上有一位领导人为了委内瑞拉的自由，将本国公民的生命置于危险之中，那就是特朗普。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Israeli Army Radio: The village of Ghandouriya, where the incident occurred in which a UNIFIL soldier was killed by Hezbollah gunfire, lies south of the Litani River and is very close to the IDF's "Yellow Line"—just 2.5 kilometres from the village…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇫🇷 🇺🇳 Lebanese President Joseph Aoun received a phone call from French President Emmanuel Macron to discuss the ceasefire and preparations for negotiations based on Aoun’s initiative. Aoun also expressed condolences over the death of a French UNIFIL soldier who was killed by "armed gunmen" in Ghandouriya, and condemned the targeting of French forces serving peace and stability. He stressed that Lebanon rejects any attack on UNIFIL, has ordered an immediate investigation, and will not tolerate those involved, vowing to bring them to justice. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列陆军电台：甘杜里耶村（Ghandouriya）位于利塔尼河南岸，非常靠近以色列国防军的‘黄线’——距离该村仅 2.5 公里。此前，一名联合国驻黎巴嫩临时部队（联黎部队）士兵在此地被真主党枪火打死……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇫🇷 🇺🇳 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩接到法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙的电话，讨论停火事宜以及基于奥恩倡议的谈判准备工作。奥恩还对一名在甘杜里耶被“武装分子”杀害的法国联黎部队士兵表示哀悼，并谴责针对服务于和平与稳定的法国部队的袭击。他强调，黎巴嫩拒绝任何针对联黎部队的袭击，已下令立即展开调查，绝不容忍涉案人员，并誓言将他们绳之以法。@wfwitness

text: To counter the blue in south Lebanon we will rely on Sepah's will and honor to not abandon us This is the war that can finally offset the dire ramifications of the 7-October war and bring back some calm Netanyahu will be dog-leach dragged by Trump if that's what is needed for a deal that's good for the U.S. Sell Trump what he wants to hear and he will drool because of his blind greed.
text_zh: 为了对抗黎巴嫩南部的蓝色区域，我们将依靠伊斯兰革命卫队的意志和荣誉，相信他们不会抛弃我们。这场战争最终可以抵消 10 月 7 日战争带来的可怕后果，并带回一些平静。如果达成对美国有利的协议需要这样做，内塔尼亚胡将被特朗普像狗一样牵着走。向特朗普兜售他想听的话，他会因为盲目的贪婪而垂涎三尺。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 Axios: A U.S. security source said the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps has carried out at least three attacks against civilian ships in the Strait of Hormuz since Saturday morning. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 UKMTO: A container ship has been hit by an unknown projectile 25 nautical miles north‑east of Oman, causing damage to some containers. No fires or environmental impact have been reported. Authorities are investigating. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 Axios：一位美国安全消息人士称，自周六早上以来，伊斯兰革命卫队已在霍尔木兹海峡对民用船只发动了至少三次袭击。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 UKMTO：一艘集装箱船在阿曼东北部 25 海里处被不明抛射物击中，导致部分集装箱受损。目前未收到火灾或环境影响的报告。当局正在调查。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷 Another incident has been reported in the Strait of Hormuz. A tanker was struck by a missile, causing damage to the vessel. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Axios: A U.S. security source said the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps has carried out at least three attacks against civilian ships in the Strait of Hormuz since Saturday morning. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷 霍尔木兹海峡又发生了一起事件。一艘油轮被导弹击中，导致船只受损。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Axios：一位美国安全消息人士称，自周六早上以来，伊斯兰革命卫队已在霍尔木兹海峡对民用船只发动了至少三次袭击。@wfwitness

text: U.S. Army Secretary Dan Driscoll: The Ukrainians have fundamentally altered how humans engage in conflict. They have done an absolutely amazing job of innovating, and I am publicly on record saying we are learning a lot from them and we are changing to a lot of the lessons that they have taught us.
text_zh: 美国陆军部长丹·德里斯科尔：乌克兰人从根本上改变了人类参与冲突的方式。他们在创新方面做得非常出色，我公开表示我们正在向他们学习很多东西，并且我们正在根据他们教给我们的许多经验教训进行改变。

text: South Lebanon is beautiful and it's my only true home. Painful to see Jews in it but eventually their blood will water its soil again. The IDF can boast as much as it wants. The Lebanese Zionists and clowns (+traitors) can make fun and ridicule as much as they want. Fight the strongest army in the West Asia and the show me what you can achieve.
text_zh: 黎巴嫩南部很美，这是我唯一真正的家。看到犹太人在那里很痛苦，但最终他们的鲜血将再次滋润这片土地。以色列国防军想吹嘘就吹嘘吧。黎巴嫩的犹太复国主义者和小丑（+叛徒）想嘲笑就嘲笑吧。去和西亚最强大的军队作战，然后向我展示你们能取得什么成就。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Another incident has been reported in the Strait of Hormuz. A tanker was struck by a missile, causing damage to the vessel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 霍尔木兹海峡又发生了一起事件。一艘油轮被导弹击中，导致船只受损。@wfwitness

text: Btw the IDF is lying when it comes to claim they control 55 towns. Count is closer to 32 most of which are tiny abandoned towns or ones demolished and abandoned in the old war (2024 like Hula, Maroun al-Ras, Mays al-Jabal) Major towns lost in this war that added to the existing buffer zone are Khiyam, Taybeh and Bint Jbeil. The operations in Bint Jbeil and Khiyam weren't complete but the IDF spread in them after. Expect new incursions to eat up more land. The area is big but mostly empty lands and mountains. Includes all Christian towns that have new Israeli buddies (old buddies) The IDF was informed that they are not allowed to attack anything outside of this blue area, not even Beqaa or Beirut or even the other areas of south Litani river. If this holds, it'll be a major success considering before March-2026 they had free reign to attack anywhere and did attack everywhere on weekly basis including Beqaa and both south/north Litani area Admin thinks the war didn't end and might resume
text_zh: 顺便说一句，以色列国防军声称控制了 55 个城镇是在撒谎。实际数字更接近 32 个，其中大多数是微小的废弃城镇，或者是旧战争中被摧毁和废弃的城镇（如 2024 年的胡拉、马龙拉斯、梅斯贾巴尔）。在这场战争中失去并增加了现有缓冲区的主要城镇是希亚姆、泰贝和宾特朱拜勒。在宾特朱拜勒和希亚姆的行动并不完整，但以色列国防军随后散布在其中。预计会有新的入侵以吞噬更多土地。该地区很大，但大部分是空地和山脉。包括所有有新以色列伙伴（老伙伴）的基督教城镇。以色列国防军被告知，他们不允许攻击这个蓝色区域以外的任何东西，甚至贝卡谷地、贝鲁特或利塔尼河南部的其他地区也不行。如果这一点能保持住，考虑到 2026 年 3 月之前他们可以自由攻击任何地方，并且每周都在包括贝卡谷地和利塔尼河南北两岸在内的所有地方进行攻击，这将是一个重大成功。管理层认为战争并没有结束，可能会恢复。

text: Hezbullah asks people NOT to stay and settle back home, especially in the south Litani area
text_zh: 真主党要求人们不要留下来并搬回原处，特别是在利塔尼河南部地区。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇳🇫🇷🇱🇧🇱🇧 UNIFIL: A UNIFIL patrol clearing explosive ordnance in the village of Ghandouriyah, southern Lebanon, came under small‑arms fire from "non‑state actors". One peacekeeper was killed and three others wounded, two seriously. Initial assessment indicates…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Army Radio: The village of Ghandouriya, where the incident occurred in which a UNIFIL soldier was killed by Hezbollah gunfire, lies south of the Litani River and is very close to the IDF's "Yellow Line"—just 2.5 kilometres from the village of Qantara, where Israeli forces are operating. The report underscores that Hezbollah continues to operate south of the Litani, in close proximity to IDF troops. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇳🇫🇷🇱🇧🇱🇧 联黎部队：一队在黎巴嫩南部甘杜里耶村清理爆炸物的联黎部队巡逻队遭到‘非国家行为者’的轻武器射击。一名维和人员死亡，另有三人受伤，其中两人伤势严重。初步评估显示……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列陆军电台：甘杜里耶村位于利塔尼河南岸，非常靠近以色列国防军的‘黄线’——距离以色列军队正在行动的坎塔拉（Qantara）村仅 2.5 公里。该报告强调，真主党继续在利塔尼河南岸、靠近以色列国防军部队的地方活动。@wfwitness

text: Ghandourieh is literally at the so-called Israeli occupation line and near Qantara The French should lick their wounds and fuck off. They have bases in the Israeli occupied area they should look after.
text_zh: 甘杜里耶实际上就在所谓的以色列占领线和坎塔拉附近。法国人应该舔舔伤口然后滚蛋。他们在以色列占领区有基地，他们应该照顾好那些基地。

text: U.S. Navy shares food photos, says its sailors are well fed with no shortages.
text_zh: 美国海军分享了食物照片，称其水兵伙食充足，没有短缺。

text: 🇺🇸 🇪🇸 Donald Trump took to Truth Social to mock Spain's economy — while apparently unaware that Spain has been outgrowing the United States for two consecutive years. Spain's economy grew 2.8% in 2025, outpacing the U.S. at 2.1% for the full year—with Q4 annualized growth at 1.4% (0.7% quarter-over-quarter). In 2024, Spain's economy grew 3.2% to the U.S.'s 2.8%. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇪🇸 唐纳德·特朗普在“真实社交”（Truth Social）上嘲讽西班牙的经济——显然他并不知道西班牙的经济增长率已经连续两年超过美国。2025年西班牙经济增长了2.8%，全年增速超过了美国的2.1%——第四季度年化增长率为1.4%（环比增长0.7%）。2024年，西班牙经济增长了3.2%，而美国为2.8%。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 The commander of Iran’s Air Defence Force Alireza Elhami said that Iranian air defences shot down an advanced MQ‑4C surveillance drone west of the Strait of Hormuz. He claimed that over 170 of the enemy’s most advanced drones and fighter jets, including…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Iranian Air Defense Force commander Alireza Elhami stated that Iranian fighter jets escorted the Pakistani army chief’s aircraft from the border to Tehran. Pakistani jets accompanied their commander to the zero point of the border before handing over to Iranian jets. The operation demonstrated that Iran’s airspace security is fully under the control of its armed forces. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 伊朗防空部队指挥官阿里雷扎·埃尔哈米（Alireza Elhami）表示，伊朗防空部队在霍尔木兹海峡以西击落了一架先进的MQ-4C侦察无人机。他声称，敌方超过170架最先进的无人机和战斗机已被摧毁，其中包括……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 伊朗防空部队指挥官阿里雷扎·埃尔哈米表示，伊朗战斗机护送了巴基斯坦陆军参谋长的飞机从边境前往德黑兰。巴基斯坦战机陪同其指挥官到达边境零点，随后移交给伊朗战机。此次行动表明，伊朗的领空安全完全处于其武装部队的控制之下。@wfwitness

text: The Lebanese army wants to arrest the shooters, the Lebanese But said NOTHING about the Israeli violations of the ceasefire or any procedures to counter them or fortify its presence in south Lebanon
text_zh: 黎巴嫩军队想要逮捕枪手，但黎巴嫩方面对以色列违反停火协议的行为只字未提，也没有采取任何反制措施或加强其在黎巴嫩南部的存在。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 The commander of Iran’s Air Defence Force Alireza Elhami said that Iranian air defences shot down an advanced MQ‑4C surveillance drone west of the Strait of Hormuz. He claimed that over 170 of the enemy’s most advanced drones and fighter jets, including F‑15s, have been destroyed. He added that Iran’s air defence remained active even during long‑range missile attacks, proving that no altitude is unreachable. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗防空部队指挥官阿里雷扎·埃尔哈米表示，伊朗防空部队在霍尔木兹海峡以西击落了一架先进的MQ-4C侦察无人机。他声称，敌方超过170架最先进的无人机和战斗机（包括F-15）已被摧毁。他补充说，伊朗的防空系统即使在远程导弹袭击期间也保持活跃，证明没有无法企及的高度。@wfwitness

text: Russian Foreign Minister Lavrov: When it was necessary to recognize Kosovo’s independence, the principle of self-determination was used—even though there was no referendum and no observers. But in the case of Crimea, a few years later, when Crimea did not want to accept the government that came to power, then suddenly territorial integrity became the main principle. Everything is adjusted depending on the situation.
text_zh: 俄罗斯外交部长拉夫罗夫：当需要承认科索沃独立时，使用的是民族自决原则——尽管当时没有举行公投，也没有观察员。但在几年后的克里米亚问题上，当克里米亚不想接受上台的政府时，领土完整突然成了主要原则。一切都根据情况进行调整。

text: ❗️ French occupation forces attempted to raid Hezbullah positions in south Lebanon's Ghandourieh town as if there is no temporary ceasefire and Israeli forces are still in Lebanon One soldier was killed and 3 others injured, including two seriously. (French die but Israelis never die) The Lebanese president Aoun called Macron to offer condolences. Expect a massive wave of arrests by the Lebanese army soon against locals and Hezbullah fighters in the town
text_zh: ❗️ 法国占领军试图突袭黎巴嫩南部甘杜里耶镇（Ghandourieh）的真主党阵地，仿佛临时停火协议不存在，且以色列军队仍留在黎巴嫩境内。一名士兵死亡，另有3人受伤，其中两人伤势严重。（法国人死了，但以色列人从不死）黎巴嫩总统奥恩致电马克龙表示慰问。预计黎巴嫩军队很快会对镇上的当地人和真主党武装人员进行大规模逮捕。

text: Russian Foreign Minister Lavrov: The so-called "rules-based order" has never existed—except as this slogan itself.
text_zh: 俄罗斯外交部长拉夫罗夫：所谓的“基于规则的秩序”从来就不存在——除了作为这个口号本身。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇺🇳 The Lebanese Army command condemned an incident in the Al‑Ghandouriya area of Bint Jbeil, where an exchange of fire between armed individuals and a UNIFIL patrol resulted in casualties among the patrol members. The army said it maintains close coordination…" ⚡️ 🇺🇳 🇫🇷 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 UNIFIL: A UNIFIL patrol clearing explosive ordnance in the village of Ghandouriyah, southern Lebanon, came under small‑arms fire from "non‑state actors". One peacekeeper was killed and three others wounded, two seriously. Initial assessment indicates the fire came from Hezbollah. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇺🇳 黎巴嫩军队指挥部谴责了宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）地区甘杜里耶（Al-Ghandouriya）发生的事件，武装人员与联合国驻黎巴嫩临时部队（联黎部队）巡逻队之间发生交火，导致巡逻队成员伤亡。军方表示，它保持着密切协调……” ⚡️ 🇺🇳 🇫🇷 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 联黎部队：一支在黎巴嫩南部甘杜里耶村清理爆炸物的联黎部队巡逻队遭到来自“非国家行为体”的小型武器射击。一名维和人员死亡，另有三人受伤，其中两人伤势严重。初步评估显示，射击来自真主党。@wfwitness
